positioning: Help students find relevant internships, tailor truthful applications, and discover alumni paths while keeping review and submission in the student's hands.
public_product_claims: Personalized internship openings based on the student's major, year, goals, and own words.
Role-specific resume and cover-letter drafts grounded in information the student provides.
Alumni paths and draft introductions that can help a student research a human connection.
The student reviews and sends; nothing is auto-submitted.
voice: specific about what a student can verify
never shame a student for limited experience
safety_rules: Never guarantee an internship, interview, response, referral, or offer.
Never invent student experience, coursework, projects, metrics, or connections.
Never expose private student data, resumes, contact details, or application materials.
Never imply that Internships.com auto-submits an application.
Every public post requires a verified brand account and exact asset approval.

visual_system.source: Public-site CSS observed on 2026-07-15; this is an operating palette, not a formal brand-guideline claim.
